expectations.text: Spec file is created under a bugs/ directory path
expectations.evidence: File named bugfix-spec.md as flat file in outputs/. No bugs/ directory structure.

expectations.text: Spec uses the bugfix template structure with Bug Description, Root Cause, and Fix Approach sections
expectations.evidence: Has Summary (not Bug Description), Evidence in Code, Root Cause, Proposed Fix (not Fix Approach). Close but not the template structure. Missing reproduction steps format, environment section.

expectations.text: Root Cause section specifically identifies subscription.go as the source of the bug
expectations.evidence: References subscription.go:26 (UpgradePlan), lines 35-36, 39, 40-49. Very specific line references.

expectations.text: Root Cause describes the plan-update-before-charge ordering issue
expectations.evidence: 'State transition to higher plan happens first. Payment attempt happens second. Failure path exits without compensation.'

expectations.text: Spec includes a Severity header field with a value
expectations.evidence: No Severity field anywhere in the spec.

expectations.text: Verification section includes at least one automated test checkbox
expectations.evidence: Test Plan section with 4 specific test scenarios: charge fails -> plan unchanged, charge succeeds -> plan updated, invalid downgrade rejected, ordering guarantee test.

expectations.text: Out of Scope section explicitly excludes unrelated refactoring
expectations.evidence: Out of Scope lists: 'Reworking recurring billing cancellation policy', 'API handler implementation', 'Full persistence/repository architecture changes'.
